fields.title: Spoken English
fields.description: Designed to build your conversational fluency, vocabulary, and pronunciation. It helps you overcome hesitation and speak naturally.

fields.title: Python Programming for Beginners
fields.description: Learn the fundamentals of Python from scratch. This course covers installation, primitive data types, control flow logic, loop iteration, and modular function design with step-by-step instructions.

fields.title: Lesson 1: Understanding Full-Stack Architecture
fields.document_content: A text/markdown guide detailing Client-Server architecture, HTTP methods, REST APIs, and CORS.

fields.title: Lesson 3: Setup & Workspace Verification
fields.document_content: Step-by-step commands to run django-admin startproject and npm create vite@latest.

fields.title: Lesson 4: Module 1 Quiz
fields.document_content: This lesson contains the module quiz. Click the Take Quiz button to start.

fields.title: Lesson 2: Serializers & CRUD ViewSets
fields.document_content: Documentation on transforming Django queryset objects into clean JSON payloads.

fields.title: Lesson 4: Module 2 Quiz
fields.document_content: This lesson contains the module quiz. Click the Take Quiz button to start.

fields.title: Lesson 2: Routing with React Router
fields.document_content: Code configurations showing how to define <BrowserRouter>, <Routes>, and <Route> parameters

fields.title: Lesson 3: Context API for Global State
Lesson 4: Module 3 Quiz
fields.document_content: This lesson contains the module quiz. Click the Take Quiz button to start.

fields.title: Lesson 2: Token Management & Private Routes
fields.document_content: Markdown snippet showing how to attach JWT credentials to request headers: Authorization: Bearer <token>

fields.title: Lesson 4: Module 4 Quiz
fields.document_content: This lesson contains the module quiz. Click the Take Quiz button to start.

fields.title: Lesson 2: WebSocket Connection in React
fields.document_content: Guide on instantiating the browser new WebSocket('ws://...') interface inside a useEffect wrapper

fields.title: Lesson 4: Final Certification Quiz
fields.document_content: This lesson contains the final quiz. Click the Take Quiz button to start.

fields.text: What is the primary role of a REST API?
Which command starts a local Vite development server?
Which DRF class parses JSON request payloads into database model instances?
Which hook is used to perform side effects (like fetching API data) in React?
Where is it safest to cache short-lived JWT access tokens in client memory?
Which server layer handles WebSockets in a Django stack?
Act as a data bridge between frontend and database

fields.comment: very informative and engaging..Good reference material
